name: memory-anolisa-openclaw-plugin
_comment_openclaw_extensions: Loaded by the OpenClaw runtime as the plugin entry. The complementary OpenClaw manifest (openclaw.plugin.json, in the same dir) declares the 4 contract tools the bundle registers; the two files must stay in sync — see Makefile's sync-versions target.
_comment_openclaw_dep: devDependencies.openclaw is pinned to CalVer 2026.5.7 because openclaw publishes under YYYY.M.P, not semver. manifest.json declares compatibleVersions: '>=5.0.0' which the CalVer string satisfies numerically by coincidence; the constraint is informational only — the plugin-sdk surface used here has been stable since OpenClaw 5.x.
